name: COMTECH TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORP /DE/
business: Comtech Telecommunications Corp. serves two core end-markets: secure satellite and wireless communications via its Satellite and Space Communications segment, and public safety via its Allerium segment. The company provides satellite modems, amplifiers, troposcatter systems, cybersecurity training, space components, and next-generation 911 infrastructure and solutions.
sellsTo: U.S. government (including DoD, USSF, all branches of U.S. Armed Forces)
namedCustomers: SED Systems (a division of Calian Ltd.)
North Central Texas Emergency Communications District

exposures.sentence: Our Satellite and Space Communications segment is one of a limited number of U.S.-based providers of satellite modems and high-power amplifiers, a market leader in troposcatter technologies, and serves some of the world's largest defense contractors and allied foreign governments, as well as multiple U.S. government agencies, including branches of the U.S. Armed Forces, U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) and U.S. Space Force (USSF), among others.
Space Components: Specializes in delivering components for antennas and high-reliability electronic components and engineering services for space programs.

Cybersecurity Training (Formerly known as Government Services): Provide advanced cybersecurity training, primarily in support of U.S. Government and certain commercial and university customers based on mature and proven training tools and programming.

Satellite Modems and Amplifiers: A leading U.S.-based provider of satellite modems and high-power amplifiers, facilitating the transmission of voice, video and data over GEO, MEO and LEO satellite constellations.
Our Allerium segment is a leading provider of next generation 911 (NG-911) infrastructure and solutions for state and local governments and telecommunication carriers.
Oil companies such as Shell Oil Company and PETRONAS.
Our Allerium segment is a leading provider of next generation 911 (NG-911) infrastructure and solutions for state and local governments and telecommunication carriers.

catalysts.event: Launch of Allerium Mira cloud-based emergency call handling solution
catalysts.sentence: We are developing, and expect to launch in fiscal 2026, our Allerium Mira solution, a multi-tenant, scalable, cloud-agnostic service offering that is purpose-built for the future of public safety.

catalysts.event: Optimization of Satellite and Space Communications operations, including facility footprint reduction and manufacturing migration to Chandler, Arizona
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we initiated a process to further optimize our operations within our Satellite and Space Communications segment. Such actions include reducing our facility footprint and migrating the manufacturing of certain products to our Chandler, Arizona facility. We expect these actions to take place primarily in the first half of fiscal 2026 and result in approximately $3.0 million of annualized cost savings.
